heroEyebrow: Womb Therapy ~ Therapeutic Bodywork ~ Gentle Motherhood Coaching
heroHeading: follow the whispers of your heart
heroBody: Suniai offers a safe space to come home to your body, and embody your Soul.
aboutBodies:
As a mother, you spend so much of your life holding others.
I offer a space where you are held, wrapped in a cocoon of safety.
Our container allows for the unraveling of untruths, so that you may remember the power of embodying and leading from your innate wisdom.

Motherhood is perhaps the most powerful initiation of our lifetime. It asks everything of us, and offers everything in return.
The chaos, the divine play, the innocence and curiosity, the deepest devotion to love ~

There is an invitation to return to wholeness through the initiation of motherhood. 

Recovered fragmented parts that were forgotten along the way.

When we choose to honor this path as Holy, we are able to access the gifts that come with this divinely ordained responsibility.

I offer womb therapy for all seasons of divine femininity, therapeutic bodywork as a prayer to the body as a temple for God,  and deeply attuned coaching experiences for mamas who know that they are here to savor a life of joyful pleasures, magnetic radiance, and radical self trust.

Within this space, time softens. The nervous system unwinds, the mind quiets, and something deeper begins to awaken. 

These sessions bring nourishment on a cellular and soul level. It is an honor to carry this medicine.

May you be held, nourished and restored daily.

In Joy,
Capri
